🎲 Run Weekly Raffle

🏆 Big Ticket Item Raffle

Students who received tickets in all 3 categories during a week qualify for the grand prize

📅 Today:

ℹ️ Qualification: Students must receive at least one ticket in all three categories (PBIS, Attendance, and Academics) during a single week to qualify for the Wildcat Jackpot. Qualification happens automatically when you complete the week.

📊 Multiple Entries: Students who qualify multiple weeks get more entries! For example, qualifying 3 weeks = 3 entries = 3x better odds of winning.

How many weeks should each Wildcat Jackpot cycle last?

Typically 4-6 weeks

💰 Wildcat Cash Settings

Behavior Management

System Settings

⚠️ Danger Zone

This will reset ALL student Wildcat Cash balances to $0. This action cannot be undone!

🔒 System Administration

Super Admin only - Dangerous operations

⚠️ Warning: These operations cannot be undone. Use with extreme caution!

👑 Promote Admin to Super Admin

Grant Super Admin privileges to an existing admin

🗑️ Reset System Data

DANGER ZONE: This will permanently delete all data and cannot be undone!

What will be deleted?

  • ❌ All student records and ticket data
  • ❌ All raffle winners and history
  • ❌ Wildcat Jackpot qualification data
  • ❌ All audit logs
  • ❌ Weekly history
  • ✅ Teacher accounts (preserved)
  • ✅ System settings (preserved)

Type "DELETE ALL DATA" to confirm:

💾 Backup Before Reset

Export all data before resetting the system (recommended!)

Test Mode Active

You are using simulated data. No real students are affected.

🚨 Encounter Prevention System

Detect patterns of coordinated hall pass usage and prevent unwanted student encounters.

Analysis Settings

Active Prevention Groups

🧪 Test Mode Controls

Test Mode allows you to safely test the Encounter Prevention system with simulated data before using it with real students.

Creates 10 fake students (IDs: TEST1001-TEST1010) and 50 passes with 3-5 suspicious patterns
Creates 2 students (IDs: TEST2001, TEST2002) with 7 bathroom overlaps (high suspicion)
💡 Testing Tip:

After generating test data, go to Student Kiosk and enter any test ID (TEST1001-TEST1010 or TEST2001-TEST2002) to create overlapping test passes and see blocking in action!

Removes all test students, passes, and patterns

Current Mode: 🧪 Test Mode

Live mode uses real student data for pattern detection

⚙️ Hall Pass Settings

📅 Bell Schedule Configuration

Configure which schedule is active today. The system will auto-detect which period students are in when they create a pass.

📍
Current Period Detection
Students' current teacher and class will be auto-filled based on their schedule
Auto-detect uses the correct schedule based on day of week. Override for special schedules.
Automatically detect student's current period and teacher

⏱️ Pass Duration Settings

🗑️ Data Management

Use these options to reset ClawPass data after beta testing or at the end of a school year.

⚠️
Warning: This Cannot Be Undone!
Resetting ClawPass data will permanently delete all hall pass history. Student schedules, raffle tickets, and Wildcat Cash will NOT be affected.

What will be deleted:

  • ❌ All hall pass history (active, returned, overtime)
  • ❌ All student daily pass limits
  • ❌ Pass statistics and analytics data

What will be preserved:

  • ✅ Student information and schedules
  • ✅ Teacher accounts and class rosters
  • ✅ All raffle tickets and history
  • ✅ All Wildcat Cash balances and transactions
  • ✅ Bell schedules and settings

✅ Pass Created!

✏️ Edit Teacher

Update teacher information

Username cannot be changed

🚦 Set Daily Pass Limit

Set a maximum number of passes this student can create per day.

Set to 0 to remove the limit

Note: This limit resets daily at midnight. Students will not be able to create passes once they reach this limit.

⚠️ Reset ClawPass Data

You are about to permanently delete all ClawPass data. This action cannot be undone!

The following will be deleted:

  • All hall pass history (current count: 0 passes)
  • All student daily pass limits
  • All ClawPass statistics

The following will be preserved:

  • ✅ All student information and schedules
  • ✅ All raffle tickets and history
  • ✅ All Wildcat Cash balances and transactions
  • ✅ Bell schedules and settings

Confirmation Required: Type DELETE below to proceed.

Create Prevention Group

Configure automatic blocking when these students try to create overlapping passes.

No students selected

Log what would be blocked without actually denying passes

✏️ Edit Bell Schedules

Customize the start and end times for each period. Times must be in 24-hour format (HH:MM).

Period editor will load here...

➕ Create New Schedule

Create a custom bell schedule with your own periods and times.

You can modify the period names and times after creation
How many class periods are in this schedule?

💡 Tip: After creating the schedule, you'll be able to edit both the period names (P1, P2, HPU, PT, etc.) and times in the schedule editor.
